ddls:
CREATE TABLE "plants" (
  "entity_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each plant entity */,
  "label" TEXT /* Common name or label of the plant species */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the plant species */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the plant species */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family to which the plant belongs */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus to which the plant belongs */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species name */,
  "subspecies" TEXT /* Subspecies name (if applicable) */,
  "common_names" TEXT /* List of common names for the plant species */,
  "distribution" TEXT /* Geographic distribution of the plant species */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Habitat where the plant species is found */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the plant species */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the record */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User ID of the researcher who created the record */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User ID of the last researcher who updated the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classification_groups" (
  "group_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each classification group */,
  "group_label" TEXT /* Label of the classification group */,
  "different_from" TEXT /* Reference to another group that is different from this one */,
  "different_from_label" TEXT /* Label of the different classification group */,
  "kingdom" TEXT /* Kingdom to which the classification group belongs */,
  "phylum" TEXT /* Phylum to which the classification group belongs */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class to which the classification group belongs */,
  "order" TEXT /* Order to which the classification group belongs */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family to which the classification group belongs */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus to which the classification group belongs */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the classification group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the record */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User ID of the researcher who created the record */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User ID of the last researcher who updated the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_classification" (
  "plant_id" TEXT /* Foreign key to the plants table */,
  "group_id" TEXT /* Foreign key to the classification_groups table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the relationship */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User ID of the researcher who created the relationship */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User ID of the last researcher who updated the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plant_id", "group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
